about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the project

## 💡 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
<!-- What problem or limitation does this feature address?
Ex: "It's currently not possible to [...] which means I have to [...] instead." -->

## 🔌 Mod Integration? (optional)
<!-- If this feature involves integrating with another mod, tell us which one and why.
This is especially useful for the roadmap! -->

**Mod name:** 
**Mod link:** 
**Why it would be useful:** 

## 📐 Proposed Solution
<!-- If you have an idea of how it could work, describe it here. Not required. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? -->

## 📎 Additional Context
<!-- Any mockups, screenshots, or links that help explain the request. -->
